text.title: Lemon Squeezy Ops Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: 3-variant LS store for an indie SaaS with EU buyer share 35%.

section.title: Setup
section.p: Solo founder ships an indie SaaS. EU buyers 35% of pipeline. Chooses LS over Stripe to avoid Atlas + tax-software setup. Targets monthly + yearly tiers + a one-time license.

section.title: Step 1-3 — store + variants

list.item: Affiliate enabled at 40% (within r5 band). 7 partners recruited.
Dunning sequence: T+1 soft, T+4 update card, T+8 final. Tested with LS test-mode failed card.
Dunning recovered 38% of failed renewals (5 of 13). Affiliate drove 9 sales total.
Promote Solo monthly to feature; demote Lifetime (consider repositioning as upsell to existing subs).

text.example: Digital SaaS with 35% EU buyers → preconditions met → store live with 6 fields → 3 variants under cap → License API on subs → affiliate at 40% → 3-touch dunning → monthly review promotes top variant; APPROVE via run-the-checklist.
